case_title: JANIS LYNN CALLON VS. AT&T WIRELESS SERVICES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALLON, JANIS LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT AT&T WIRELESS SERVICES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATI ON JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALLON, JANIS LYNN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AT&T WIRELESS SERVICES, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATI ON $842.58 PRINCIPAL, $17.63 INTEREST, $151.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,011.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
